name: drug-registration
description: 药品申报注册模拟系统 - NMPA Drug Registration Simulation

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.start: cd server && NODE_ENV=production npx tsx src/index.ts
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
